fixture: 071_aggregate_functions

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE readings (group_id INTEGER NOT NULL, amount INTEGER NOT NULL, ok BOOLEAN NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO readings VALUES (1, 10, TRUE)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO readings VALUES (1, 20, TRUE)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO readings VALUES (2, 30, FALSE)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT
      COUNT(*) AS row_count,
      SUM(amount) AS total_amount,
      AVG(amount) AS average_amount,
      MIN(amount) AS min_amount,
      MAX(amount) AS max_amount,
      EVERY(ok) AS all_ok
    FROM readings
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] row_count BIGINT NOT NULL
      [1] total_amount INTEGER
      [2] average_amount NUMERIC
      [3] min_amount INTEGER
      [4] max_amount INTEGER
      [5] all_ok BOOLEAN
    rows:
      [0] 3 | 60 | "20" | 10 | 30 | false

statement 6:
  sql:
    SELECT
      group_id,
      COUNT(*) AS row_count,
      SUM(amount) AS total_amount,
      AVG(amount) AS average_amount,
      MIN(amount) AS min_amount,
      MAX(amount) AS max_amount,
      EVERY(ok) AS all_ok
    FROM readings
    GROUP BY group_id
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] group_id INTEGER NOT NULL
      [1] row_count BIGINT NOT NULL
      [2] total_amount INTEGER
      [3] average_amount NUMERIC
      [4] min_amount INTEGER
      [5] max_amount INTEGER
      [6] all_ok BOOLEAN
    rows:
      [0] 1 | 2 | 30 | "15" | 10 | 20 | true
      [1] 2 | 1 | 30 | "30" | 30 | 30 | false
